archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (with subtle Archetype 5 Luxury for chess motif)
design_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Combine rigid CRM data structures with classic chess tournament elegance.
Emotion First: The app must feel authoritative, precise, and premium.
Content is King: Data clarity is paramount. Emphasize alerts and pipeline stages.
Contrast: Stark black and white, reflecting the chessboard. Accents used strictly for functional status.

rules: DO NOT use Inter or generic sans for headings. Headings MUST be Cormorant Garamond for a classic, authoritative chess vibe.
Body and data tables MUST use IBM Plex Sans for maximum legibility.
Overlines/Labels must be UPPERCASE, text-xs, tracking-[0.2em].
Do not exceed text-6xl for hero/main headings.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: Control Room Grid (Dense, Data Correlation) optimized for Mobile-First.
layout_and_spacing.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-4 to p-8 on containers.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Mobile-first: always start with grid-cols-1. Left-align dense content.
layout_and_spacing.navigation: Mobile: Sticky bottom navigation bar (Glassmorphism). Desktop: Left sidebar.
layout_and_spacing.borders: Expose the skeleton. Use Grid Borders (The Technical Look) - 1px subtle borders (border-border/40) for dashboard items.

surface_strategies.headers_nav: Crystal Glass: bg-white/70, backdrop-blur-xl, border-b border-border/40.
surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Flat solid background, 1px border-border, no shadow. Hover: -translate-y-1, shadow-sm.
surface_strategies.decorative_motif: Subtle checkerboard pattern in the background of empty states or auth screens (opacity 5%).

rules: Use Shadcn components but heavily customize them. Strip out default Vercel-look.
Forms: Use Shadcn Input, Select, Form, Checkbox.
Cards: Go rectangular, dense styles. max 4px to 8px border-radius.
Buttons: Sharp edges or slightly rounded. Primary buttons are stark black.

views_and_features.auth: Multi-role login. Split screen on desktop with gold chess pieces image. Overlay opacity max bg-black/50.
views_and_features.dashboard: Alerts prioritized at the top (unpaid fees, missed classes). Bento grid for quick stats.
views_and_features.students: List view with quick actions (call, mark attendance, note).
views_and_features.leads_pipeline: Funnel stages (New, Contacted, Trial Scheduled, Trial Done, Enrolled, Not Interested). Kanban on desktop, vertical expandable list on mobile.
views_and_features.chatbot: Floating AI assistant FAB. Opens a sleek, chat interface for querying CRM data.

accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').

image_urls.description: Gold chess pieces on black background. Use for login/auth screen.
Chess tournament scene. Use for dashboard banners or empty data states.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Update index.css to import 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'IBM Plex Sans' from Google Fonts.
2. Configure tailwind.config.js with the specified fonts and color palette.
3. Scaffold the layout with a mobile bottom tab navigation (Dashboard, Students, Leads, Chat).
4. Implement the AI Chatbot as a prominent feature (FAB or dedicated tab). Mock the AI responses for queries.
5. Build the Leads Pipeline with functional state changes.
6. Ensure all components use 'data-testid' for testing.
7. Populate the UI with rich seeded data to demonstrate the CRM capabilities.
